title: Simply Pink
description: A pink cursor for the Minecraft Cursors mod. Thats it.
body:
Its my first time using modrinth. This is a resource pack for the mod "Minecraft Cursor". All it does is when you enable it, **it makes the cursor pink**. I know. _Innovative_.

edit of "Mini Cursor Light" pack that official creator "[fishstiz](https://modrinth.com/user/fishstiz)" made, Go check them out!
